description: Import the KML file at /home/ga/Documents/grand_prismatic_trail.kml containing Grand Prismatic Spring boardwalk trail waypoints in Yellowstone National Park. Navigate to view the imported placemarks over the thermal feature and save a screenshot to /home/ga/Documents/grand_prismatic_imported.png.

metadata.data_source: OpenStreetMap/NPS trail coordinates for Yellowstone National Park
